name: Buddhism
tagline: Suffering arises from clinging. Liberation is letting go.
summary: Buddhism diagnoses suffering as the product of craving and the illusion of a fixed self. Its path is one of attention, ethical conduct, and the steady investigation of mind until grasping releases on its own.

quotes.text: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
quotes.author: The Buddha

quotes.text: Hatred does not cease by hatred, but by love alone.
quotes.author: The Buddha

quotes.text: The present moment is the only moment available to us.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh
